content_body: The drive up was on a mostly paved road and not difficult at all. We arrived at a gorgeous cabin with breathtaking views! There was plenty of space and gorgeous views from every balcony. The kitchen was well stocked and made cooking for the group a breeze. The cabin is situated on top of a mountain and the spot on the river is great. Good for fishing, splashing and tubing. Overall, the cabin was big, clean, and beautiful and we had a great time.
title: Breathtaking Views!
